underlying_goal: Verify and correctly rename Friends Season 06 video files so each MKV matches the actual episode it contains, including labeling commentary tracks
friction_detail: Initial script couldn't verify episodes because MKVs had no embedded subtitles, requiring Whisper installation as fallback.
brief_summary: User needed to verify and correctly rename mislabeled Friends S06 video files using audio transcription, and all episodes were successfully identified and renamed.
